titleStmt.title: SII 33.78: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 78. (A.R. No. 146 of 1947.) Peṇḍēkallu, (hamlet of Sarapharājapuram), Dronachalam Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Nandi Pillar set up in front of the Īśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1598, Nala, Jyēshṭha ba. 30, Thursday, solar eclipse corresponding to 1676 A.D. June 1, Thursday. Solar eclipse.

Registers a gift of land by the Reḍḍis (viz., Papireddi, Venkatreddi, Timmareddi and Buchireddi) and Karaṇams (viz., Saravarāju and Mangalagiri) of the village of Sarapharājapuram situated midway between Rāmaḷḷakōta and Pendēkallu to Vābaṁbhaṭlu, son of Narasambhaṭlu, the archaka of the temple of Rāmeśvarasvāmin for conducting worship and offerings god. The gift was made during the administration of the Kandanavōlu-Paṭṭana by Sarapharājukhānu, son of Bāḍēkhan Sāhebu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu 1598 Agunē
ṭi naḷanāmasaṁvatsarajē
ṣṭa ba 30 gu . rājaśrī kaṁ
ddanavōli paṭṭaṇaṁ yē
lē baḍekhānu sāhebu
la komāḷlu saraparāju
khānu sāhēbula ye
lubaḍilōnu rāmaḷla kō
ṭa peṁḍekaṁṭi madhyamaṁ
duṁna grāmaṁ saraparā
japuraṁ reḍikaraṇālu re
ḍiciṭela veṁggarreḍi nāga
māṁba kumāḷlu pāpire
ḍiva(ve)ṁkaṭareḍi tiṁmāreḍi
buccireḍilakṣmireḍigā
ruṁnu karaṇaṁ tū
mukuṁṭa lakṣarāju ra
ṁgamāṁba kumāḷlu
saravarāju maṁgaḷagiri
gāruṁnnu vubhayatra
lu yekavākyaṁgānu

sūryōparāga
puṇyakāla
maṁdugrāmā
nikitū[¨r]pu
dikkunaguḍi
dhārāvula
yalacama
kumāḷlu ve
ṁggana kaṭiṁci
na rāmēśva
rasvāmi A¨rca
kulayina
tuṁmalū
rinarasaṁbhaṭla
narasamāṁba
kumāḷlu vā
baṁbhaṭlaku
yī tathā
tripuṇya

kālamaṁdu trivācaka
ṁgānu śudhigānu yi
cina bhūdāna dha¨rmma
śāsanapatra kramame
ṭlaṁnanu yī dha¨rmma
niki vutaraṁ cēnu bija
vōlilōni tōṭa ma
137 vubhayaṁ cēnu
tōṭa bijavōlina
lō 0 . 031 yiccinā
mu ganaka yīkṣētra
ṁvallanu vaccina pala
ṁdēvuniki dīpārā
dhananevādyālu
yi caraka mīputra
pautra pāraṁparyā
ṁtara dānādi kra
ya miṁṇaya
yōgyaṁ baguna
ṭlu gānu Āca
ṁdrā¨rkasthāyi
gānu Anubhaviṁ
cumani yicina

bhūdāna dha¨rmma
śāsana patraṁ sva
dattā dviguṇa
ṁpuṇyaṁ para
dattānu pāla
naṁparadattāpa
hārēṇa svada
taṁ niṣpalaṁ bha
vēt . Anēnā
yaṁ tabbayi
ṁdulaku ya
vvaru Ācēli
ṁcinā prayā
ga mukhya ma
ṁṭapa maṁdu
gohatya braṁ
hatya cēśina
pāpāna bō
duru turaka
lu tappitē ma
kkālō paṁdi
ni caṁpina pā
takānabōduru
Aṭugāna dha¨rma
padaṁgānaḍi
